description: §38.13.3 — a `watches=` channel with no `<onchange>` handler fires W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-CONSUMER (Warning): nothing consumes the change feed. Per §38.13.3 a `watches=` channel body contains exactly one `<onchange>` element.
rationale: §38.13.3: a `watches=` channel with no `<onchange>` SHALL emit W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-CONSUMER — nothing consumes the feed. Warning severity; asserted against the warnings stream.
